3203360.name: DEADBYTE
3203360.description:
Step into an adrenaline-fueled, round-based zombie survival FPS—play solo or team up with up to 3 friends online! Mow down endless hordes of the undead, earn cash from every kill, and gear up with powerful weapons, perks, upgrades, and more. The deeper you go, the deadlier it gets!

  • A round-based zombie shooter inspired by classics

  • Play by yourself or up to 4-players online

  • A Complete Experience without Microtransactions/DLCs

  • 6 Maps at Launch

  • 50+ Weapons to use & Upgrade

  • Many Perks & PowerUps

  • Hidden Secrets (Easter Eggs)

  • Infinite Replayability

SOLO OR WITH FRIENDS

Built for up to 4 players online, BRAINDEAD cranks up the challenge based on how many survivors are in your squad. Strength in numbers—but only if you work together. Join our Official Discord to team up with like-minded fighters and take on the madness together!

CLASSIC ENEMIES

The world is overrun by zombies and hellhounds! Arm yourself and fight through relentless waves of terror—only the brave will survive and advance!

GUNS & PERKS

Customize your loadout mid-battle—buy powerful guns and game-changing perks on the fly! Unlock the mighty PowerPuncher3000 to supercharge your weapons, unleashing devastating laser-enhanced rounds that obliterate enemies in a blaze of glory!

POWERUPS

Slay any enemy and you might trigger a powerup drop—random, rare, and game-changing! These boosts grant survivors massive temporary advantages, or even permanent rewards like bonus cash or mysterious random perks. Every kill counts!

LUCKY OR NOT?

Got extra cash and a thirst for the unknown? Take a gamble at the Mystery Box—spin the odds and unleash a random weapon that could turn the tide of battle... or seal your fate!
3203360.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 德语, 西班牙语 - 西班牙, 简体中文, 韩语, 日语, 葡萄牙语 - 巴西, 俄语
